title: pest farming equipment textures
description: Adds textures to the pest farming/hunting equipment in hypixel skyblock to make easier to see.
body:
This resource pack adds the ability to see your the pest equipment and blossom equipment/davids cloak easiar making your grind more fun and less downtime. This Resource pack will change the texture of the equpment pieces and make them bright colors so you can easily know where there are at all times. You should download this resource pack so that the pest grind that you do is not just looking for your equipment but killing the pest and making money.



**Pesthunter Equipment:**



![Pesthunter Equipment](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/97ed074edc412478421f84ead60528c48a88e0fd.png)



**Blossom Equipment:**


![Blossom Equipment](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/468974af0b4e7ac263a89cd9f1c543b4b6d0c44b.png)





**David's Cloak:**


![David's Cloak](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a628cf6ea1fe34931cc2f268dfdbc71efd9097b8.png)
